summary: Iteration 79 tested major auto-compilation update for Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Settings page shows EN 1090 certification section with 5 new fields (responsabile_nome, ruolo_firmatario, ente_certificatore, ente_certificatore_numero, certificato_en1090_numero). Fascicolo Tecnico section shows 6 document cards with high completion percentages (100% for most). DOP dialog shows 12 AUTO badges confirming auto-population from: company settings (firmatario, ente, certificato, responsabile, ruolo), client (mandatario), material batches (materiale, saldabilita, resilienza), dates (ddt_data, data_emissione, luogo_data_firma), commessa (ddt_riferimento with /01 suffix).
test_credentials: Test users created/cleaned during pytest run and UI tests
seed_data_creation: Test commesse, clients, preventivi, material_batches created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 adds comprehensive auto-compilation for Fascicolo Tecnico: (1) Company settings now include 5 EN 1090 fields: responsabile_nome, ruolo_firmatario, ente_certificatore, ente_certificatore_numero, certificato_en1090_numero - all save/load correctly via /api/company/settings. (2) GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} auto-populates ~12 fields from various sources and returns _auto_fields list. (3) RESILIENZA_TABLE lookup normalizes material types (removes +AR, +N, +M suffixes) - S355JR returns '27 J a 20 °C', S275J2 returns '27 J a -20 °C'. (4) DDT numbering uses commessa/01 suffix format. (5) SmartField component shows AUTO/DA COMPILARE badges. (6) FascicoloTecnicoSection shows 6 document cards with filled/total completion indicators.

company_settings_en1090_save.details: PUT /api/company/settings saves all 5 EN 1090 fields correctly

fascicolo_ddt_riferimento_suffix.details: ddt_riferimento auto-populated with commessa/01 suffix (e.g., UI-COMM-2025-001/01)

fascicolo_luogo_data_firma.details: luogo_data_firma auto-populated with city and today's date

resilienza_s355jr_lookup.details: S355JR returns '27 J a 20 °C' from RESILIENZA_TABLE

resilienza_s275j2_lookup.details: S275J2 (with +N suffix normalized) returns '27 J a -20 °C'

auto_fields_list_complete.details: _auto_fields list in response includes all auto-populated field names

frontend_settings_en1090_section.details: Settings page Logo tab shows 'Certificazione EN 1090' card with all 5 fields and correct data-testids

frontend_fascicolo_6_document_cards.details: Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 section shows 6 document cards: DOP, Marcatura CE, Piano di Controllo, Rapporto VT, Registro Saldatura, Riesame Tecnico

frontend_auto_badges.details: DOP edit dialog shows 12 AUTO badges indicating auto-populated fields with green border styling

frontend_dop_auto_population.details: All expected fields auto-populated in DOP dialog: DDT Riferimento, Data DDT, Mandatario, Firmatario, Ruolo Firmatario, Luogo e Data Firma, Certificato Numero, Ente Notificato, Materiali/Saldabilita, Resilienza, Redatto da
